title: Dielytra tenuifolia
taxonomy: Dielytra tenuifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Dielytraceae. It belongs to the order Ranunculales and is native to Australia. The classification of Dielytra tenuifolia is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Angiosperms, Class: Magnoliopsida. Further classification includes: Order: Ranunculales, Family: Dielytraceae, Genus: Dielytra, and Species: D. tenuifolia. Its classification is an example of a unique and endemic species in the Australian flora.
uses: Dielytra tenuifolia is reported to have various medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
